Retrieves metrics for API proxy performance in an environment. Provides traffic, latency, error counts, and other analytics data across specified time ranges.

query.description: (Required) Comma-separated list of metrics. Example: sum(message_count), avg(total_response_time).
(Required) Time range for the query in the format MM/DD/YYYY HH:MM~MM/DD/YYYY HH:MM.
Granularity of the time series (second, minute, hour, day, week, month).
Filter expression to narrow the results.
Comma-separated list of columns to sort the results.
Sort order (ASC or DESC).
Return the top k results.
Maximum number of records to return.
Offset for pagination.
